title: LessonRules.md attendance enum values contradict code and AttendanceRules.md
description: LessonRules.md defines NOT_STARTED, PRESENT, LATE, LEAVE_APPROVED, LEAVE_REJECTED, ABSENT, MAKEUP. Code has PRESENT, ABSENT, LATE, LEAVE, MAKEUP, ONLINE, OFFLINE. LessonRules.md is the outlier — AttendanceRules.md matches code.
